label_en: Profession (for example teachers, nurses, promoters, etc.)
Not working but not looking for a job/ employment
label_es: Sin empleo pero no buscando empleo

label_es: Trabajo en una finca, cultivo o hacienda

label_en: Sale of food, products or fruits and vegetables
label_es: Venta de comida, productos o frutas y vegetales

label_en: Some service in the tourist area
